escalation.rationale: US-Iran ceasefire has formally collapsed with renewed strikes near Bushehr nuclear plant, Iran firing ballistic missiles at four Gulf states, IRGC vowing a crushing response, and Strait of Hormuz traffic severely depressed, while the Russia-Ukraine front sees North Korea supplying 40% of Russian artillery ammunition and Poland threatening to cut arms aid to Kyiv.

ticker_items: IRGC vows 'crushing response' to any further US strikes on Iran.
US strikes reported near Bushehr nuclear plant; Iran fires ballistic missiles at Kuwait, Bahrain, Qatar, Jordan.
Trump declares ceasefire over; threatens to 'completely decimate' Iran if assassination attempted.
Senator Lindsey Graham reported dead — breaking news per Al Jazeera.
Poland signals possible cut to Ukraine arms aid amid WWII historical dispute.

new_entrant.text: Kuwait, Bahrain, Qatar, and Jordan entered the direct strike zone as Iran launched ballistic missiles at those four Gulf states following US strikes near Bushehr nuclear plant.

eastern_europe.description: Russian drones and missiles continued striking Ukrainian territory as Kyiv accelerates domestic production of PAC-3 interceptor missiles.
Ukrainian drones targeted Omsk; a Russian Su-57 scrambled but failed to intercept the incoming UAVs.
Russia's FSB claims to have intercepted 13 AI-guided Ukrainian drones smuggled for an attack on Rostov-Centralny military airfield after a recruited Russian citizen alerted authorities.

middle_east.description: US missiles reportedly struck near the perimeter of Iran's Bushehr nuclear power plant, causing regional flight disruptions.
Iran fired ballistic missiles at Kuwait in retaliation for US strikes, according to government officials.
Iran fired ballistic missiles at Bahrain as part of a retaliatory salvo targeting US-aligned Gulf states.
Iran launched ballistic missiles at Qatar following US strikes near the Bushehr nuclear facility.
Iran fired ballistic missiles at Jordan as part of a multi-target retaliatory strike on July 9.
Houthi forces killed at least 15 Yemeni government troops in Hodeidah clashes; a cargo ship was also attacked 30 nautical miles southwest of Hodeida.

today.kia: ~3,468 in Iran; ~3,696 in Lebanon; ~28 in Gulf states

today.incident: Hodeidah ground clashes — Yemeni government troops

claimed_totals.claim: Gulf state deaths (Iran ballistic missile strikes)
North Korea artillery shell supply to Russia

russia.text: Russia condemns the vandalism of a Soviet World War II cemetery in Leusden, where a monument and around 150 gravestones were defaced.
russia.speaker: Russian Foreign Ministry
russia.title: Official statement

middle_east.text: Any further US attacks will be met with a crushing response.
middle_east.speaker: IRGC spokesperson
middle_east.title: Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps

middle_east.text: The ceasefire is over, but the United States and Iran agree to continue talks.
middle_east.speaker: Donald Trump
middle_east.title: US President

middle_east.text: If Iran tries to assassinate me, I have left orders to bomb Iran at levels they have never seen before.
middle_east.speaker: Donald Trump
middle_east.title: US President

middle_east.text: The Ankara NATO summit was a historic meeting; the alliance reached consensus at a time of global uncertainty and strategic divisions.
middle_east.speaker: Hakan Fidan
middle_east.title: Turkish Foreign Minister

observers.description: The US is conducting direct military strikes on Iran, including near the Bushehr nuclear plant, while simultaneously pausing operations amid ceasefire collapse talks. Trump has threatened extreme escalation if Iran targets US leadership, while the administration advances secondary sanctions on Russian oil buyers.

Iran declared the ceasefire over and fired ballistic missiles at four Gulf states following US strikes near Bushehr. The IRGC has publicly vowed a crushing response to any further US attacks, and Iran's new supreme leader has called for revenge.

North Korea is reported to be supplying approximately 40% of Russia's artillery ammunition. Xi Jinping urged China and North Korea to maintain strategic resolve amid global turmoil, signaling continued alignment.

China and Russia conducted joint naval exercises in the Yellow Sea. Xi Jinping urged North Korea to maintain strategic resolve, reinforcing the China-Russia-DPRK alignment bloc amid ongoing global conflicts.

Turkey hosted the NATO summit in Ankara, with Foreign Minister Fidan calling the outcome historic. Turkey continues to occupy an ambiguous position as both NATO host and a state maintaining ties with Russia.

Poland is signaling a potential cut to arms aid for Ukraine amid an ongoing historical dispute over WWII-era Ukrainian nationalist atrocities. This would represent a significant blow to Ukraine's western flank supply chain if enacted.

Houthi forces resumed Red Sea shipping attacks and killed at least 15 Yemeni government troops in Hodeidah. Houthi activity is linked to Iran's broader regional posture and has suppressed Strait of Hormuz and Red Sea traffic significantly.

financial.notes: Strait of Hormuz traffic is reported well below pre-war levels as global oil inventories draw down, driving elevated energy prices and tightening supply; US senators advanced secondary sanctions legislation targeting buyers of Russian oil.

update_log.text: IRGC publicly vows 'crushing response' to any further US military strikes against Iran.
Breaking: US Senator Lindsey Graham reported dead by Al Jazeera — no further details confirmed.
Trump states ceasefire with Iran is over but US-Iran talks will continue; threatens to 'completely decimate' Iran over assassination plot.
US missiles reportedly struck near the perimeter of Bushehr nuclear power plant; regional flights disrupted.
Iran fired ballistic missiles at Kuwait, Bahrain, Qatar, and Jordan on July 9 following US Bushehr strikes.
Strait of Hormuz traffic reported significantly below pre-war levels; global oil deficit deepening.
NATO Ankara summit concluded; Turkey's Fidan calls consensus 'historic success'; Trump-Meloni rift publicly visible.
Poland signals possible suspension of arms aid to Ukraine amid WWII historical commemoration dispute.
Bipartisan US Senate sanctions bill targeting Russian oil buyers advances with support from over 80 senators.
Russia's FSB claims to have thwarted AI-guided Ukrainian drone plot targeting Rostov-Centralny military airfield; 13 drones intercepted.
Al Jazeera live tracker reports cumulative US-Israel strike deaths: ~3,468 in Iran, ~3,696 in Lebanon, ~28 in Gulf states.
